name: Orange Cherry Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Dried Cherries (or Currants, or Cranberries)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F.
Mix all ingredients in a bowl or food processor. The mixture will be thick and sticky.
Form into two long logs on a parchment-lined baking sheet sprayed with Pam.
Bake for 20 minutes.
Let cool for about 10 minutes.
Slice the logs into cookies of your desired thickness using a sharp knife.
Place the cookie slices on the same baking sheet or a new one.
Bake for an additional 15 minutes per side, until crisp and golden brown.
Cool completely on a wire rack. The cookies will continue to harden as they cool.
